summary: RETEST PASSED: Quote Creation Simplification fixes verified. QuotesPage.jsx with SystemItemSelector is now properly wired into App.js at /admin/quotes route. All frontend features working: Create Quote button, catalog search, 'Waiting for pricing' badges, pricing warning banner. Backend API tests 13/13 passed.

minor.issue: Some API calls return 404 during page load (company settings, quotes list) - non-blocking

critical_code_review_comments: QuotesPage.jsx is now correctly imported at line 72 and routed at line 640 in App.js
SystemItemSelector correctly tracks pricing_status on line items
QuoteBuilderDrawer in CRM also has pricing_status handling (line 88)
'Waiting for pricing' amber badge displays correctly for zero-price items
Pricing warning banner shows count of items waiting for pricing
seed_data_creation: Test quotes created during backend testing with TEST_ prefix
context_for_next_testing_agent: Quote Creation Simplification is complete. QuotesPage with SystemItemSelector is accessible at /admin/quotes. QuoteBuilderDrawer in CRM also supports pricing_status. All status transitions work correctly.

frontend_quotes_page_routing.details: QuotesPage.jsx is imported at App.js line 72 and routed at line 640 to /admin/quotes

frontend_create_quote_button.details: Create Quote button visible and functional at /admin/quotes

frontend_system_item_selector.details: SystemItemSelector opens catalog search panel, returns products from /api/public-marketplace/products

frontend_waiting_for_pricing_badge.details: Amber 'Waiting for pricing' badge shows for items with zero price

frontend_pricing_warning_banner.details: Warning banner shows: 'X items waiting for pricing from Vendor Ops. Quote cannot be sent until all prices are set.'

crm_quote_builder_drawer.details: QuoteBuilderDrawer in CRM has pricing_status field tracking and 'Waiting for pricing' badge

backend_quote_creation_with_pricing_stat.details: POST /api/admin/quotes-v2 accepts line_items with pricing_status field

backend_status_transitions.details: All transitions work: draft, waiting_for_pricing, ready_to_send, sent, approved, rejected, expired, converted

backend_api_tests: Product search returns array with required fields - PASSED
POST /api/admin/quotes-v2 with priced items creates draft quote - PASSED
POST /api/admin/quotes-v2 with waiting_for_pricing items creates waiting_for_pricing quote - PASSED
PATCH status transition draft → ready_to_send - PASSED
PATCH status transition ready_to_send → sent - PASSED
PATCH status transition sent → approved auto-generates Invoice + Order - PASSED
PATCH status transition waiting_for_pricing → ready_to_send - PASSED
GET /api/admin/quotes-v2/{id} get quote by ID - PASSED
frontend_ui_tests: SystemItemSelector (data-testid='system-item-selector') visible after clicking Create Quote - VERIFIED
Add Item button (data-testid='add-system-item-btn') opens search panel - VERIFIED
Line items added with pricing_status tracking - VERIFIED
'Waiting for pricing' badge (data-testid='waiting-badge-X') shows for zero-price items - VERIFIED
Pricing warning banner (data-testid='pricing-warning') shows count of waiting items - VERIFIED
CRM QuoteBuilderDrawer opens from lead detail - VERIFIED
QuoteBuilderDrawer has Add Product/Service buttons - VERIFIED
